name: swap-finder
description: Find non-profit gear swap events across the USA and build a contact database

scripts.discover: npm run build && node dist/index.js discover
scripts.discover:regional: npm run build && node dist/index.js discover --regional-only
scripts.enrich: npm run build && node dist/index.js enrich
scripts.backfill-valedictions: npm run build && node dist/index.js backfill-valedictions
scripts.pipeline: npm run build && node dist/index.js run
scripts.outreach:sync: npm run build && node scripts/export-superjobs.js; test -f contacts.csv || cp output/contacts.csv contacts.csv; cp contacts.csv docs/contacts.csv; cp index.html docs/index.html; cp job-detail.html docs/job-detail.html; npm run outreach:config
scripts.outreach:serve: npm run outreach:sync && npm run outreach:dev
